com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.

Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    UriValidator StringValidator.asUri()
    Returns a validator for the URI representation of the value.
    UriValidator UrlValidator.asUri()
    Returns a validator for the URI representation of the value.
    UriValidator UriValidator.asUrl​(Consumer<UrlValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.

    Ensures that the actual value is absolute.

    Validates the requirements of a URI.

    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  UriValidatorImpl
